name: Hash Brown Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Press the hash browns into a greased pie plate.
2. Brush with melted butter.
3. Bake for 25 minutes at 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Layer the ham and cheeses on top.
5. Beat together the eggs, Half and Half, and salt.
6. Pour over the quiche.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-40 minutes.
